author: doll-agent
content: Generator<B>::choice_dyn ships with the full numpy.random.Generator.choice(arr, size, replace, p, axis, shuffle) signature. 1-D choice unchanged. Output shape replaces shape[axis] with size; size=0 produces an empty array with the right shape. 8 tests cover the main paths and edge cases. cargo test -p ferray-random green; clippy -- -D warnings clean.
